description: Alice extends the Tuesday strategy session from 1 hour (10-11 AM) to 2 hours (10 AM-noon).

events.title: Strategy Session
events.reasoning: Alice and Frank agree to extend the Tuesday strategy session from 1 hour to 2 hours. Start remains 10 AM, end moves from 11 AM to noon. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Start time unchanged. Duration extended to 2 hours as explicitly agreed.

mock_llm_response.summary: Extended strategy session on Tuesday from 10-11 AM to 10 AM-noon.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Tuesday' resolves to 2026-02-24. Only the end_time changes in this update. calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1.
